hero.badge: For the next generation of thinkers
hero.headline: Think clearly. Argue better.
hero.subheadline: Noetic is an AI-moderated space where students share beliefs, debate peers, and build reasoning skills that last a lifetime.

illustration.caption: A place to be in dialogue, not in performance.

universities.label: In the company of thinkers.
universities.clarifier: Aspirational — we're building Noetic with these students in mind

one.title: Share a thought.
one.body: Type out an opinion, belief, or argument — anything you want to examine more closely.

two.title: Watch it decompose.
two.body: Noetic's AI breaks your argument into claims, assumptions, and evidence, exposing what's solid and what isn't.

three.title: Debate it live.
three.body: Get matched with a peer for an AI-moderated discussion that challenges both of you to think harder.

four.title: Grow over time.
four.body: Track your reasoning, articulation, and listening skills as you practise — and watch them improve.

feedback.title: Personalised AI Feedback.
feedback.body: Feedback on your reasoning, clarity, and how you handle disagreement — tailored to how you actually think.

brainrot.title: An Antidote to Brain Rot.
brainrot.body: Instead of doom-scrolling, train how you think. Replace passive consumption with active reflection.

belief.title: Belief vs. Absorption.
belief.body: Sort what you actually believe from what you've passively absorbed online. Find your own positions.

debate.title: Live Guided Debates.
debate.body: Practice articulating and defending ideas in real conversations with peers, moderated by AI.

reviews.label: What people are saying
reviews.title: In their words.
reviews.empty: Be the first to share your thoughts about Noetic.

items.a: Noetic is an AI-moderated platform for critical thinking and debate. You share a belief or argument, the AI breaks it apart, you debate it with a peer — and over time you build measurably stronger reasoning skills.
Primarily students and young thinkers aged 14–25 who want to think more clearly and argue more effectively. Educators use it to structure in-class debate and track student reasoning growth.
We'll offer a free tier with core features. A paid plan will unlock unlimited debates, detailed feedback history, and educator tools. Early waitlist members get extended free access at launch.
None at all. Noetic is built for people who've never debated formally. The AI moderator guides the structure and the feedback is always constructive, not competitive.

items.q: How is Noetic different from social media?
items.a: Social media optimises for reaction and outrage. Noetic optimises for understanding. There are no likes, no follower counts, no viral loops — just structured dialogue and honest feedback.

items.q: How does the AI moderation work?
items.a: The AI doesn't take sides. It listens, identifies logical gaps or unsupported claims, asks clarifying questions, and ensures both speakers stay on topic. Think of it as a referee with a philosophy degree.
Your arguments and debates are used only to generate your feedback. We never sell your data, and you can delete your account and all associated data at any time.
We're in closed development with a small group of students right now. Join the waitlist to be among the first to access the platform when we open wider.

waitlist.label: Think clearly. Argue better. Join Noetic.
waitlist.body: No spam. Just early access and updates.

footer.tagline: Building the next generation of rigorous, respectful thinkers.
